key_findings: Declarative YAML + LLM-based generation achieves FPC=1.0, TPR=1.0, ZFPR=1.0
AL improved from 0.0 to 0.5 (declarative descriptions replace code snippets)
LIS improved from 20 to 0 (all language-specific info scoped to knowledge.bsv)
ID worsened from 1.24 to 3.75 (declarative descriptions are more verbose than code)
LLM correctly interpreted natural language descriptions and generated working BSV
Cross-file function dependencies (calcPktNumByLength from Utils4Test) need explicit handling in YAML
next_actions: iter_003: Reduce ID by making YAML more compact while keeping AL≥0.5
iter_003: Try different YAML structure (property-based instead of narrative descriptions)
iter_003: Target T04 SpecialFIFOF for state machine validation
